The `!#if (adguard_app_ios || ... || ext_ublock)` section for `belestepe*.sbs` was narrowed to only `belestepe635.sbs` (including the twitter video `$domain=` exception). Given this is a frequently-rotating domain and the surrounding rules rely on regex `$domain=/belestepe\d+\.sbs/`, restricting the explicit list to one mirror will cause the rules in this `!#if` block to stop matching as soon as the mirror number changes on those platforms.
